videos.headline: Caden Durham jump-starts LSU offense with 71-yard TD on 1st play from scrimmage
videos.description: Caden Durham catches the pass from Garrett Nussmeier and races into the end zone to give LSU a 7-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Caden Durham jump-starts LSU offense with 71-yard TD on 1st play from scrimmage) 2024/09/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Nussmeier punches in the TD after Durham's 86-yard run
videos.description: Caden Durham takes an 86-yard run to the 1-yard line, and Garrett Nussmeier punches in the score for LSU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Nussmeier punches in the TD after Durham's 86-yard run) 2024/09/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Garrett Nussmeier finds the end zone for 2nd rushing TD
videos.description: Garrett Nussmeier takes it up the middle on the designed run and scores to give LSU a 28-3 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Garrett Nussmeier finds the end zone for 2nd rushing TD) 2024/09/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Garrett Nussmeier finds Aaron Anderson for a 23-yard LSU TD
videos.description: Garrett Nussmeier connects with Aaron Anderson for a touchdown to extend LSU's lead vs. South Alabama.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Garrett Nussmeier finds Aaron Anderson for a 23-yard LSU TD) 2024/09/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Gio Lopez throws 27-yard touchdown pass to Anthony Eager
videos.description: Gio Lopez throws 27-yard touchdown pass to Anthony Eager
